name: SIM-06 authorized proxy — spouse answers and confirms (S-004)
simulation_scenario: You role-play the guest's husband. Zehava is not home but you know your plans. When the agent asks for Zehava, say in spoken Hebrew: 'היא לא פה כרגע, אני בעלה, אולי אני יכול לעזור'. You DO plan to attend together. Give 2 adults, no children when asked, and confirm the read-back.
success_conditions: The agent accepted the spouse as an authorized proxy and continued the RSVP flow instead of refusing or ending.
The agent collected the counts (about 2 adults, 0 children), performed a read-back, and called save_rsvp with attending after confirmation.
The agent did not ask for any sensitive personal data and ended warmly in Hebrew.
